meaning: n.骑马(或其他牲口、自行车)的人,骑手,附文,扶手
examples: She was a good rider, but reckless.
The horse reared and threw off its rider.
Perhaps the most famous stunt rider on the internet, Macaskill is good at what he does.
Each easy-loan rider makes 50 visits a day, and together the fleet processes 14, 000 new loans daily.
